Rythmos® Sleep Mat

Technical Specification & Installation Reference · Rev 2026

Sleep duration
Heart rate
Respiratory
Movement
Snoring

Overview

Rythmos® Sleep Mat is an under-mattress sensor that continuously collects sleep and health data, enabling caregivers to monitor resident wellbeing and detect changes in nighttime behavior.

FUNCTIONS

Monitors sleep duration and cycles
Tracks heart rate and respiratory rate
Detects snoring and behavior changes

Key Capabilities

Sleep
Monitoring

Continuous
tracking of sleep

Health
Insights

Heart
rate and breathing monitoring

Apnea
Detection

Identifies
breathing anomalies

Snoring
Detection

Tracks
snoring and related patterns

Behavior
Tracking

Detects
changes in nighttime activity

Care
Visibility

Provides
data for caregiver

Hardware Specifications

Dimensions: 637 × 190 × 5 mm
Weight: 350 g
Power: 5V / 1A USB adapter
Connectivity: Wi-Fi (2.4 GHz) · Bluetooth (setup)
Sensor Technology: Pneumatic + sound sensors
Installation: Under-mattress placement
Whitelist Capacity: Up to 900 fobs / wearables
Wearable Range: 1-30 ft (adjustable)
Compatibility: 4–15 in mattress thickness
Firmware Updates: OTA

System Topology — Sleep Mat Deployment

The sensor should be installed under the mattress in the primary sleeping area, ensuring full and consistent contact with the mattress surface for accurate data capture. Monitoring should focus on trends over time rather than isolated events to provide meaningful insights into user patterns.

Installation Guidelines

Placement

- Install under mattress
- Position at chest level

Compatibility

- Works with 4–15 in thickness
- Suitable for standard beds

Power

- Requires 5V / 1A USB power
- Continuous power required

Connectivity

- Connect via Wi-Fi (2.4 GHz)
- Bluetooth used for setup

Cleaning

- Removable cover is machine washable
- Ensure cover is fully dry before use

Care

- Do not use liquids on sensor
- Keep sensor protected inside

Handling

- Do not bend, fold, or apply pressure
- Avoid removing cover unnecessarily

Service

- Do not attempt to repair or open
- Contact support for hardware issues

intrexis.com
